headlines.description: — Tyrese Haliburton thought he let the Indiana Pacers down in the fourth quarter.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haliburton and Pacers eliminate Bucks from playoffs, closing OT with 8-0 run to win 119-118

events.name: Detroit Pistons at New York Knicks

headlines.description: — The players the Pistons put together to turn a 14-win team into a playoff squad aren't ready to split up for the summer.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pistons beat Knicks 106-103 in Game 5 to stay alive in the first-round series

headlines.description: — When Magic star Paolo Banchero went to the bench with five fouls, the Boston Celtics pulled away and cruised into the Eastern Conference semifinals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Defending champion Celtics close out Magic 120-89 for 4-1 playoff series win

headlines.description: — Nuggets interim coach David Adelman sensed one of Jamal Murray's patented playoff performances coming, and he was right on the money — just like his point guard.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jamal Murray, Russell Westbrook spark the Nuggets' 131-115 win over the Clippers
